## This week on agent-office (2026-04-13 â†’ 2026-04-18, 63 commits on `main`)

**Phase 1â€“3 foundation (Apr 13, `bd59458`, `6a1ede2`, `ca066d7`)** â€” Foundation, Agent Core (personas/skills/resolver/launcher), and Memory Engine (domain-scoped queries, injector, importer) all landed in a single day.

**Phase 4 Office UI (Apr 13â€“14)** â€” React frontend with pixel-art office scene (`eaebe7c`, `69510ec`). Then on Apr 14 you extracted the pixel-agents engine into proper modules (`a88a3c6` â†’ `fd62f21`: constants/types, sprites, floor/wall tiles, layout, core engine, browser asset loader) and wired it into a 25Ă—20 office with 7 themed zones and an `OfficeCanvas` React wrapper (`a4ef81e`, `c8c8f57`, `6ac04c0`). Several positioning/coord fixes followed (`b1ca00b`, `48daeac`, `85bff97`).

**Launcher + claude-mem integration (Apr 14, Phase 4.6)** â€” Read-only SQLite adapter for claude-mem (`d109f26`), persona-to-observation filter (`e079b4f`), context injection into launches (`1c875a4`), iTerm2 tab spawning (`64ed75e`), and a `LaunchPreview` flow showing last session + persona memories + skills (`27cb1d3`, `c0f0d86`, `a0549e3`, `acdddfa`). Merged to main as `6b61356`.

**Phase 5 Telemetry dashboard (Apr 15, `3199451`/`2534692`)** â€” Provider adapters, office state, portfolio stats (`4d9806d`), redesigned picker with provider-aware preview (`42aab52`), local skill roots (`a4cb528`), UTC anchor fix for today-window stats (`c1a2dc7`).

**Provider-neutral history + doctor (Apr 16)** â€” `9c4afb4` adds provider-neutral project history ingestion, `3b9f1a9` adds the doctor command. Stability fixes: live-session presence (`a8f6bd4`), idle grace period (`aaa47ed`), local port resolution (`ef1cec2`), Codex history summary enrichment (`fc03de3`).

**Unified memory brief + semantic search (Apr 18, the headline work)** â€”
- `4d9a58a` persona-scoped memory brief generator
- `17bf243` wires the brief into live session launch
- `ec56fb9` renders it in `LaunchPreview`
- `2dbef00` exposes unified memory stats + semantic search and **drops the claude-mem fallback**
- `3c1cf94` persona memory stats + semantic search in project picker
- `3b6c0b4` consolidates LaunchWizard into a single 4-step modal
- `0c3dfbd` adds `sqlite-vec`, `@huggingface/transformers`, `playwright`
- `40c5014` bench harness for brief vs raw-memory token savings (the `bench/` + `scripts/bench-*.mjs` that are still untracked in your working tree per `git status`)
- `01f2a70` Playwright LinkedIn carousel capture
- `d5da889` simplifies office floor to Boss/Workspace/Dungeon + Fixer
- `18e1cbb` README rewrite around the unified memory USP
- `1b6fbb5` Codex submission id matching fix

**Uncertain / not verified here:** I did not open individual files, run tests, or verify that the bench scripts and `bench/` data produce the token-savings numbers referenced in the README â€” only that the harness commit and the untracked artifacts exist. The memory index (S294, S830, S841) also flags those bench artifacts as still untracked, which matches `git status`.
